mapper.insert: INSERT INTO transactions (uuid_user, uuid_category, uuid_recurring_item, type, amount, memo, transaction_date) VALUES (#{uuidUser}, #{uuidCategory}, #{uuidRecurringItem}, #{type}, #{amount}, #{memo}, #{transactionDate})
mapper.select: SELECT t.uuid, t.uuid_user, t.uuid_category, t.uuid_recurring_item, t.type, t.amount, t.memo, t.transaction_date, t.created_at, t.updated_at, t.deleted_at, c.code AS category_code, c.name AS category_name FROM transactions t JOIN categories c ON t.uuid_category = c.uuid WHERE t.uuid = #{id}
mapper.update:
UPDATE transactions
uuid_category = #{uuidCategory}, type = #{type}, amount = #{amount}, memo = #{memo}, transaction_date = #{transactionDate},
WHERE uuid = #{uuid} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE transactions SET deleted_at = NOW() WHERE uuid = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
